summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Learn pillar implementation. All features verified working: LearnManager admin component, LearnPage frontend, backend APIs, and Learn pillar integration in Command Center, Service Desk, and Unified Inbox.

features_verified.evidence: Learn tab (🎓 Learn) visible in PILLAR TOOLS section, LearnManager component renders with data-testid='learn-manager'
5 stats cards visible: Total Requests, Pending, In Progress, Completed, Programs (showing 3 programs)
All 6 tabs present: Requests, Programs, Trainers, Products, Bundles, Settings
Hero section with 'Unlock Your Pet's Full Potential' text, 6 training type cards, 3 program cards, 2 trainer cards
MiraContextPanel is fixed positioned on right side (fixed right-4 top-24) like other pillars
Button with data-testid='request-training-btn' opens modal, shows login prompt for non-logged-in users

features_verified.feature: View Profile button on trainer cards
features_verified.evidence: View Profile buttons with data-testid='view-profile-{id}' open Trainer Profile modal with trainer details
Returns 6 programs with all required fields (id, name, description, duration, sessions, price)
Returns 3 trainers with all required fields (id, name, title, rating, experience_years, city)
POST request seeds sample data: 3 programs, 2 trainers, 2 products, 1 bundle
📚 Learn filter visible in pillar tabs alongside Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Shop, Club, Enjoy, Fit
Learn pillar present in ServiceDesk.jsx pillar icons (line 30) and pillar filters (line 54)
All Pillars dropdown filter includes Learn pillar

context_for_next_testing_agent: Learn pillar is fully implemented and working. LearnManager admin component is identical to FitManager. LearnPage has MiraContextPanel fixed-positioned like other pillars. All CRUD endpoints work. Learn pillar is integrated in Command Center, Service Desk, and Unified Inbox.

api_endpoints_verified./api/learn/programs: Returns 6 training programs with all required fields
api_endpoints_verified./api/learn/trainers: Returns 3 trainers with all required fields
api_endpoints_verified./api/learn/admin/seed: Seeds sample programs, trainers, products, bundles

screenshots: .screenshots/learn_page.png - LearnPage hero section and training types
.screenshots/admin_learn_programs.png - Programs tab with Add Program button
